name: Siva Kalyan Karicheti
headline: I build practical systems where artificial intelligence, enterprise software and data meet.
aboutPrimary: I am an MSc Artificial Intelligence student at ECE Engineering School in Paris, with a B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering and hands-on ERP development experience.
aboutSecondary: My work spans SAP ABAP, Python, data visualization and web technologies. I enjoy turning technical requirements into reliable solutions and learning the system deeply enough to improve it.

skills.name: Python (Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn)
skills.description:
•Extensive knowledge in data manipulation using Pandas - DataFrames, merging, grouping, pivoting.
•Knowledge on numerical computing with NumPy - arrays, broadcasting, vectorized operations.
•Knowledge on building Machine Learning models using Scikit-learn - regression, classification, clustering.
•Good knowledge on model evaluation train-test split, cross-validation, accuracy/precision/recall.
•Basic knowledge in exploratory data analysis and visualization using Matplotlib and Seaborn.
•Basic knowledge in feature engineering and handling missing data.

skills.name: SAP ABAP
skills.description:
•Exclusive knowledge of RICEF(Reports,Interfaces,Conversions,Enhacements And Forms) objects. 2020 – 2024 2018-2020 2017 – 2018.
•Knowledge on Data Dictionary objects like Tables, Views, Structures, Table maintenance.
•Extensive Knowledge in generating of Reports (Classical, Interactive and ALV).
•Conversions: Call Transaction and Session Method’s using Data Migration.
•Basic Knowledge in Enhancements User exits, Customer exists, BADI’S.
•Knowledge on Layouts: SMARTFORMS Knowledge.
•Good Knowledge on Modulepool Programming and creating different types of modulepool concept
connecting different concepts in it for creating Asset Mangement for Organisation.
•Debugging techniques – Break Points to debugging.

skills.name: AWS
skills.description:
•Knowledge on core compute services – EC2 instances and basic deployment.
•Knowledge on storage services – S3 buckets and object storage concepts.
•Basic knowledge in Identity and Access Management (IAM) – users, roles, permissions.
•Basic knowledge in database services – RDS fundamentals

skills.name: MySQL
skills.description:
•Extensive knowledge in relational database design – schemas and normalization.
•Knowledge on writing complex queries – JOINs, subqueries, GROUP BY, HAVING.
•Good knowledge on indexing and basic query optimization.
•Basic knowledge in stored procedures and triggers.

skills.name: Power BI
skills.description:
•Extensive knowledge in data modeling – relationships and star schema design.
•Knowledge on DAX (Data Analysis Expressions) for measures and calculated columns.
•Good knowledge on Power Query for data transformation and cleaning.
•Knowledge on building interactive dashboards with slicers and filters.

skills.name: Data Visualization
skills.description:
•Knowledge on selecting appropriate chart types for different data.
•Extensive knowledge in building dashboards using Power BI and Tableau.
•Basic knowledge in visualization libraries in Python – Matplotlib, Seaborn.

skills.name: Statistics (GA4)
skills.description:
•Knowledge on setting up tracking and events in Google Analytics 4.
•Basic knowledge in interpreting traffic sources, engagement, and conversions.
•Basic knowledge in building custom reports and exploring user behavior.

skills.name: C Language
skills.description:
•Knowledge on programming logic and control flow.
•Extensive knowledge in memory management – pointers, dynamic memory allocation.
•Knowledge on data structures – arrays, linked lists, stacks, queues.

skills.name: HTML & CSS
skills.description:
•Knowledge on structuring web pages using semantic HTML elements.
•Basic knowledge in forms, tables, and accessibility basics.
•Knowledge on styling – selectors, box model, Flexbox, Grid.
•Basic knowledge in responsive design using media queries.

skills.name: Tableau
skills.description:
•Extensive knowledge in connecting to and blending multiple data sources.
•Knowledge on building calculated fields and parameters.
•Good knowledge on designing interactive dashboards with filters and actions.

skills.name: SQL
skills.description:
•Extensive knowledge in writing SELECT queries with filtering, sorting, and aggregation.
•Knowledge on JOIN operations – inner, left, right, full joins.
•Good knowledge on subqueries and nested queries.
•Basic knowledge in window functions.

skills.name: ChatGPT, Claude & Microsoft Copilot
skills.description:
•Knowledge on prompt engineering for accurate, structured outputs.
•Extensive knowledge in using AI assistants for code generation, debugging, and documentation.
•Basic knowledge in using AI tools for research summarization and content drafting.

skills.name: Excel (Pivot Tables, Dashboards, XLOOKUP)
skills.description:
•Extensive knowledge in building Pivot Tables for data summarization.
•Knowledge on XLOOKUP and other lookup functions.
•Good knowledge on building dynamic dashboards using charts and slicers.
•Basic knowledge in conditional formatting and data validation.

skills.name: Artificial Intelligence
skills.description:
•Knowledge on supervised and unsupervised learning – regression, classification, clustering, dimensionality reduction.
•Knowledge on neural network architectures – ANN, CNN, RNN fundamentals.
•Extensive knowledge in model training concepts – loss functions, gradient descent, overfitting/underfitting.
•Basic knowledge in Natural Language Processing – tokenization, embeddings, text classification.
•Basic knowledge in AI ethics and responsible AI practices.

experience.title: MSc in Artificial Intelligence
experience.description: Developing advanced foundations in AI while connecting them to real-world software and data problems.

experience.title: ERP Developer
experience.description: Supported ERP development, customization and maintenance; wrote and modified code, helped configure systems, troubleshot issues and created technical documentation.

experience.title: B.Tech, Computer Science & Engineering
experience.organization: Anil Neerukonda Institute of Technology and Sciences
experience.description: Graduated with a 7.5 GPA and completed a final-year IoT safety research project presented at an international conference.

projects.title: NVIDIA logistics workflows
projects.description: Developed Smart Forms for packing lists, commercial invoices and bills of lading; built ALV programs for POD updates; integrated carrier data; used BAdI implementations; worked with screen painter, menu painter, tab strips, table controls and production support.

projects.title: Student Performance Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: An end-to-end student data processing pipeline and interactive visualization system for academic performance, attendance and engagement metrics, tailored for instructors and institutional administrators.

projects.title: Bitcoin and BlockCypher
projects.description: A project creating transactions using Bitcoin and BlockCypher testnets, Bitcoin Script and python-bitcoinlib, including outputs, inputs, scriptPubKey and scriptSig validation.

projects.title: GuardianAir
projects.description: A sensor-driven airbag inflation concept combining IoT and real-time monitoring to reduce Sudden Infant Death Syndrome risk and improve newborn safety while sleeping. The project paper was published at an international conference.

achievements.title: International conference publication
achievements.description: GuardianAir research was presented at the International Conference on Data Science and Artificial Intelligence (ICDSAI 2024).

achievements.title: Enterprise logistics delivery
achievements.description: Delivered SAP ABAP forms, ALV programs, integrations and production support for logistics workflows.
